3155960.name: Queendom
3155960.description:
It is a turn-based strategy game similar to a board game.

Objective of the Game:
Capture 12 regions. Each controlled region gives 1 point. The first player to reach 12 points wins.

Game Structure:
The game is divided into turns, and each turn consists of three phases:

1. Orders Phase

  • Select a region by left-clicking on it, then choose the appropriate order.

  • You can give up to 3 orders per turn.

  • After assigning orders, click the ‘Next Turn’ button and wait for the other players.

2. Execution Phase

  • Once all players have confirmed their orders, they take turns executing the selected actions.

Available Orders:

  • March – Move a unit to another region.

  • Defend – Adds +1 strength to a unit defending this region during the next turn.

  • Mustering – Adds +1 unit to the region.

  • Capture Territory – Gain control of a neutral or enemy region to be able to give orders on it.

  • Hold a Tournament – The winner becomes a new card in your hand.

  • Support – Assist a neighboring region in battle; your supporting army loses 1 strength.

3. World Phase

  • A random event card is drawn, affecting the overall game world.

  • Then, the next turn begins.

Features:

  • Issue orders on your territories by carefully planning your strategy and tactics.

  • Manage your deck — victory depends on how wisely you use your cards.

  • Command your troops — can you achieve your objective with minimal losses?

  • Single-player and multiplayer modes — battle AI or challenge your friends.
